name: CPF Financial Services
message: cpf.or.ke https://www.zoominfo.com/c/cpf-financial-services-ltd/434613110 CPF Financial Services is a financial institution that specializes in pension fund administration, management consulting, corporate training, and trust fund administration. They offer a range of products including M-Pension, defined contribution schemes, and post-retirement medical schemes. The company aims to provide innovative and sustainable financial solutions to its stakeholders, focusing on enhancing financial security and opportunities. Their intended clients include individuals and organizations seeking comprehensive financial services and retirement planning.
